name: Avoid boolean prop proliferation (React composition)
description: CRITICAL: don’t add mode booleans (isThread/isEditing/etc.). Create explicit variants and compose internals instead.

metadata.intent: Prevent exponential complexity by replacing boolean-mode props with composition

must_not: Add multiple isX booleans to a single component to control rendering
conventions: Each variant should be explicit about what it renders; no hidden conditionals.

steps.description: Each boolean doubles possible states, producing unmaintainable conditional logic. Replace booleans with explicit variants that compose shared internals.
Refactor approach: identify boolean modes → extract shared primitives → create `ThreadComposer`, `EditComposer`, etc. → delete boolean branching.
